title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
